sylph_db.help_text: Path to a pre-built Sylph database (.syldb).

sylph_tax_metadata.help_text: Path to the sylph-tax metadata TSV to use for taxprof.

sylph_method.help_text: Sylph command to use for reference selection. Choices: query, profile.

taxonomic_grouping.help_text: Taxonomic rank by which to group references. Choices: domain, kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, species.
